title: angelica ursina
intro: Angelica ursina, also known as Bear Root or Angelica pubescens, is a perennial plant native to Asia and North America, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Angelica ursina include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function, among others. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, capsules, and tinctures, which are available in health food stores or online, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties for optimal well-being.
